economic_notes: Nation operates a store in Dog Creek community. Has two GBEs: SXD Limited Partnership (99.99% owned) and SXDC Ltd. (wholly owned). Both GBEs recorded losses in 2020. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with uncertain impact.
notes: Auditor firm name not clearly stated - only 'Chartered Professional Accountants' from Prince George BC is noted. Nation consolidates Housing, Health, Treaty, and Store programs as departments. Two GBEs (SXD Limited Partnership and SXDC Ltd.) accounted for under modified equity method - both recorded losses in 2020. Significant ISC deferred revenue related to subdivision and solid waste projects. Ottawa Trust Funds of $1,396,976 included in accumulated surplus. COVID-19 disclosed as subsequent event. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($5,696,316) + Province of BC ($1,560,553) + CMHC ($45,379) + First Nations Health Authority ($173,603) + FNESG ($153424) + CCATEC ($165,535) + Northern Shuswap Treaty Society ($488,507) - some transfers may overlap with society funding. OSR calculated as total revenue minus estimated government transfers.
